allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(data[0][''text''][:30000]\)")
Bash(npm install @react-navigation/native @react-navigation/drawer @react-navigation/stack react-native-screens react-native-safe-area-context react-native-gesture-handler react-native-reanimated)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''version:'', p[''version'']\); print\(''peerDeps:'', p.get\(''peerDependencies'', {}\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; vs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); v2=[v for v in vs if v.startswith\(''2.''\)]; print\(''Latest v2:'', v2[-1]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; vs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); recent=[v for v in vs if not \(''alpha'' in v or ''beta'' in v or ''rc'' in v\)]; print\(''Latest 5:'', recent[-5:]\)")
